title: Implement build site material delivery and construction completion
summary: Implement the minimal build-site demand, material delivery and deterministic construction progress needed to complete the first hauling/building vertical scenario.
acceptance: Build sites register material demand and build work offers without broad production orders
Delivered materials convert from reserved carried items into site inventory exactly once
Construction progress uses deterministic integer ticks and creates the approved map/entity result through command phases
Failure reasons distinguish missing materials, blocked site, reservation conflict, path failure and invalid blueprint state

history.details: Implemented minimal build-site material delivery, deterministic construction completion, building tests, and hauling-building headless scenario; required checks pass.
verified: Verified: WM-0027 build-site delivery/construction acceptance confirmed; required checks, 100k hauling-building scenario, lint, and boundary scan passed.

review.summary: Verified: WM-0027 build-site delivery/construction acceptance confirmed; required checks, 100k hauling-building scenario, lint, and boundary scan passed.
